name: neon-chord-finder
description: Angular vertical slice for searching guitar chords by name and rendering SVG diagrams from chords-db.

scripts.start: ng build chord-finder && ng serve neon-chord-finder
scripts.build: ng build chord-finder && ng build neon-chord-finder
scripts.build:gh-pages: ng build chord-finder && ng build neon-chord-finder --base-href /chord-generator/
